dataset.name: Pump affinity law: shaft power ratio
dataset.source: Affinity laws for centrifugal pumps and fans, verified (research dossier 7.2.12)

notes.name_en: Pump affinity law: shaft power ratio
notes.name_es: Leyes de afinidad de bombas: potencia al eje
notes.summary_en: The cleanest dimensional-analysis case in the set. With units enforced the exponents are forced by the physics; without units they must be found by search. Running the same case with rung 8 on and off is the whole argument for unit-typed generation.
notes.summary_es: El caso de analisis dimensional mas limpio del conjunto. Con unidades impuestas los exponentes quedan forzados por la fisica; sin unidades hay que encontrarlos por busqueda.
caveats: The cleanest DIMENSIONAL-ANALYSIS case in the set, and the natural place to demonstrate the unit-typed rung: with units enforced the exponents are forced, without units they must be found. Running both configurations on this one case is the whole argument for rung 8.
notes.split_note: extrapolation split holds out the lowest and highest 30 rows of 'n2', so the training region is an interior box and the extrapolation rows lie outside the support the search ever saw
notes.features_note: Units are declared, so the unit-typed rung constrains generation. Target dimension: 1.

variants.note_en: Tree genetic programming as published in 1992: tournament selection, subtree crossover, no scaling, no guards. Every later chip must beat this by a measured margin.
variants.note_es: Programacion genetica de arboles como se publico en 1992: seleccion por torneo, cruce de subarboles, sin escalado ni salvaguardas. Cada chip posterior debe superarlo por un margen medido.

variants.note_en: Adds closed-form optimal slope and intercept per candidate, plus interval arithmetic that rejects a division by an interval containing zero BEFORE evaluating it. No protected operators.
variants.note_es: Anade pendiente e intercepto optimos en forma cerrada por candidato, mas aritmetica de intervalos que rechaza una division por un intervalo que contiene cero ANTES de evaluarla.

variants.note_en: Adds Levenberg-Marquardt fitting of every numeric leaf, written back into the tree so the improvement is inherited rather than rediscovered each generation.
variants.note_es: Anade ajuste Levenberg-Marquardt de cada hoja numerica, reescrito en el arbol para que la mejora se herede en lugar de redescubrirse en cada generacion.

variants.note_en: Complexity stops being a penalty and becomes a second objective. The output stops being a model and becomes a front. This is the chip that changes what the product reports.
variants.note_es: La complejidad deja de ser una penalizacion y pasa a ser un segundo objetivo. La salida deja de ser un modelo y pasa a ser un frente.

pareto.units_reason: expression has dimensions m, target is 1
sin requires a dimensionless argument, got m

variants.note_en: Selection judges one training case at a time instead of on aggregate error, so specialists survive. Measured cost at this budget: about 22 times the baseline wall-clock.
variants.note_es: La seleccion juzga un caso de entrenamiento a la vez en lugar del error agregado, de modo que los especialistas sobreviven. Costo medido: unas 22 veces el tiempo de la base.

pareto.units_reason: expression has dimensions m, target is 1
sin requires a dimensionless argument, got m

variants.note_en: Age becomes an objective and the population splits into migrating islands, so fresh material is not immediately outcompeted by an entrenched lineage. The Eureqa recipe.
variants.note_es: La edad pasa a ser un objetivo y la poblacion se divide en islas con migracion, de modo que el material nuevo no es desplazado de inmediato por un linaje establecido.

variants.note_en: Structural and semantic hashing skip candidates already evaluated. The count avoided is reported, because it is a measurement about the search, not an implementation detail.
variants.note_es: El hashing estructural y semantico omite candidatos ya evaluados. El conteo evitado se reporta, porque es una medicion sobre la busqueda, no un detalle de implementacion.

expression has dimensions m, target is 1

variants.note_en: Dimensional analysis constrains GENERATION, so an expression that adds a mass to a time is never built. Only available where the inputs carry declared units.
variants.note_es: El analisis dimensional restringe la GENERACION, de modo que nunca se construye una expresion que sume una masa a un tiempo. Solo disponible cuando las entradas declaran unidades.

pareto.units_reason: expression has dimensions m, target is 1

variants.note_en: Not an evolutionary search at all: a fixed library of nonlinear terms, then sequentially thresholded least squares at a sweep of sparsity levels. Deterministic, so it returns the same answer every run, and it produces the accuracy-versus-complexity front by construction rather than searching for it. Its ceiling is the span of the library.
variants.note_es: No es una busqueda evolutiva: una biblioteca fija de terminos no lineales y minimos cuadrados con umbral secuencial sobre un barrido de niveles de dispersion. Es determinista, asi que devuelve la misma respuesta en cada corrida, y produce el frente de exactitud frente a complejidad por construccion. Su techo es el espacio generado por la biblioteca.
